steps.title: Identify Text 2's criticism
steps.content: Text 2 says scholars have focused too much on experimental versus conventional poetic forms. That focus has inhibited inquiry into other stylistic similarities among modernist poems.

steps.title: Match the limiting effect
steps.content: Choice A introduces the reading experience, which Text 2 does not discuss. Choice B overstates the issue as a misconception disproved by distant reading. Choice D says form study complements other features, but Text 2 says it blocks fuller inquiry. The answer is C.
